summary: Comprehensive testing of Ariadne Editorial Studio UX refactor features completed. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly. New UX features fully functional: sidebar grouping with status badges, readiness indicator, StartCampaignPage with checklist, AgentsPage with presets, CoursesPage with clone, WorkflowPage with essential mode.
critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Essential mode state correctly passed via React Router location.state
Readiness API returns consistent counts matching actual database state

backend: Login with arianna.perrone@ariadne.test / password123 - creates user if not exists
/api/setup/readiness returns all expected fields (profiles_active_count, rules_count, agents_active_count, repository_total, ready, missing)
/api/setup/readiness counts match actual data in database
/api/agents/preset with preset='standard' activates correct agents (veloce + compliance_icf)
Agent toggle on/off works for non-always-on agents
/api/agents returns all 10 agents with required fields
Creating planning rules via API works
frontend: Login redirects to /dashboard after successful authentication
Sidebar navigation grouped into Avvio, Produzione, Contenuti, Setup sections
Colored status badges on Setup items (green for ok, yellow for warn)
Readiness indicator (green/yellow circle) next to Ariadne logo in sidebar
StartCampaignPage (/start) shows readiness checklist with dynamic counts
StartCampaignPage: 'Avvia workflow' button enabled when all required items ready
StartCampaignPage: Essential mode toggle works and shows description card
StartCampaignPage: 'Vai a' links navigate to correct pages (/profiles, /rules, /agents, /repository)
AgentsPage (/agents) lists all 10 agents with toggle switches
AgentsPage: Preset buttons (Veloce, Standard, Alta qualita) work and show toast
AgentsPage: Individual agent toggles work (non-always-on agents)
CoursesPage (/courses) shows courses with clone button (Copy icon)
CoursesPage: Clone creates duplicate with '(copia)' suffix and shows toast
WorkflowPage with essential mode hides advanced fields (posts per profile, rule selection)
WorkflowPage: Full step navigation visible (Campagna, Profili, Agenti, Pianifica, Genera, Revisione)

seed_data_creation: Test user arianna.perrone@ariadne.test created via registration API if not exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UX refactor features are working correctly. The app has 5 social profiles, 2+ rules (may vary due to test cleanup), 10 agents (variable active state due to preset tests), and variable courses (cloned ones may exist). Test user arianna.perrone@ariadne.test exists in the database.
